# comfyui_workspace (Resource)

Composes multiple ComfyUI workflows into a single UI-oriented workspace export with deterministic layout.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `layout` (Attributes) Typed, CSS-inspired layout controls used to position workflow islands on the canvas. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--layout))
- `name` (String) Human-readable name for the exported workspace.
- `workflows` (Attributes List) Ordered workflows to place on the shared canvas. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--workflows))

### Optional

- `node_layout` (Attributes) Node readability controls applied to workflow nodes before builder layout is added. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--node_layout))
- `output_file` (String) Optional file path to write the composed workspace JSON.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier for this workspace resource.
- `workflow_count` (Number) Number of workflows included in the workspace.
- `workspace_json` (String) The composed ComfyUI workspace JSON.

<a id="nestedatt--layout"></a>
### Nested Schema for `layout`

Required:

- `display` (String) Layout engine to use. Supported values are flex and grid.

Optional:

- `columns` (Number) Number of grid columns when display is grid.
- `direction` (String) Primary flow direction for flex layouts.
- `gap` (Number) Default gap between workflow islands on both axes.
- `origin_x` (Number) Canvas origin offset on the X axis.
- `origin_y` (Number) Canvas origin offset on the Y axis.


<a id="nestedatt--workflows"></a>
### Nested Schema for `workflows`

Required:

- `name` (String) Display name for this workflow island.
- `workflow_json` (String) ComfyUI API-format workflow JSON, typically from comfyui_workflow.<name>.assembled_json.

Optional:

- `style` (Attributes) Optional visual styling for this workflow island. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--workflows--style))
- `x` (Number) Optional absolute X position override for this workflow island.
- `y` (Number) Optional absolute Y position override for this workflow island.

<a id="nestedatt--workflows--style"></a>
### Nested Schema for `workflows.style`

Optional:

- `group_color` (String) Optional group color used when rendering the workflow island.
- `title_font_size` (Number) Optional title font size used when rendering the workflow island.



<a id="nestedatt--node_layout"></a>
### Nested Schema for `node_layout`

Optional:

- `column_gap` (Number) Horizontal gap between nodes.
- `direction` (String) Node layout direction. v1 supports left_to_right only.
- `mode` (String) Node layout mode. v1 supports dag only.
- `row_gap` (Number) Vertical gap between nodes.
